DavidIlie/plexo: Plex library dashboard that visualizes movies, shows, watch history, analytics and recommendations.
DavidIlie/home-cluster: My GitOps homelab repo: Flux-driven Kubernetes and Proxmox configs for a personal server cluster.
DavidIlie/ilo4-fan-controller: Web UI and REST API to remotely control modded iLO4 fan speeds on HP Gen8 servers.
DavidIlie/personal-dashboard: Personal Next.js dashboard for monitoring and launching the author's self‑hosted services.
DavidIlie/tcl-home-ac: Reverse‑engineered TCLHome client to access and control TCL air conditioners programmatically.
DavidIlie/tuya-smart-ir-ac: Home Assistant custom integration to control Tuya IR‑based air conditioners from your HA instance.
DavidIlie/davidilie.com: Author's Next.js + TypeScript personal website and blog/portfolio.
DavidIlie/sharex-upload-server: Self‑hosted ShareX upload server with web UI and API for images, files and text.
DavidIlie/laundrey: Simple app to track clothes handed into laundry — a personal laundry check‑in system.
DavidIlie/reddam-pokemon-go: A React Native websocket game for students to find school rooms, with admin dashboard and scoring.
DavidIlie/packet-tracer-mcp: Turns LLM prompts into live Cisco Packet Tracer network topologies—plan, validate, generate, and deploy.
DavidIlie/tokmon: Terminal dashboard for Claude Code—shows usage, tokens, costs, and rate limits.
